# matomo_tagmanager_tag_googleadsconversion (Resource)

Send an event to track conversions. This tag requires Google Tag (gtag.js) tag to be configured.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "matomo" {}

resource "matomo_site" "example" {
  name = "Example GoogleAdsConversion Site"
  urls = ["https://example-googleadsconversion.example.com"]
}

resource "matomo_tagmanager_container" "example" {
  site_id = matomo_site.example.id
  context = "web"
  name    = "Example GoogleAdsConversion Container"
}

resource "matomo_tagmanager_trigger" "example" {
  container_id = matomo_tagmanager_container.example.id
  type         = "PageView"
  name         = "Example GoogleAdsConversion Trigger"
}

resource "matomo_tagmanager_tag_googleadsconversion" "example" {
  container_id = matomo_tagmanager_container.example.id
  name         = "example-googleadsconversion"
  fire_trigger_ids = [matomo_tagmanager_trigger.example.id]
  google_ads_conversion_id = "example-value"
  google_ads_conversion_label = "example-value"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `container_id` (String)
- `fire_trigger_ids` (List of String)
- `google_ads_conversion_id` (String)
- `google_ads_conversion_label` (String)
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `block_trigger_ids` (List of String)
- `google_ads_conversion_currency` (String)
- `google_ads_conversion_transaction_id` (String)
- `google_ads_conversion_value` (String)
- `status` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
